name: Mushroom-Cheese Ramen Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Ramen noodles according to package directions.
2. In the last few minutes of cooking, add the can of mushroom soup. Stir until well mixed for about 2 minutes.
3. Add a cup of grated cheese on top of the noodles without mixing.
4. Cover with the lid and let it sit until the cheese is melted.
5. Serve.
